title: Ranking Of Things 👑
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5350f3b066dd2f9cafb1503a0c36ea4cf65b6a23.png)

# Rank your items !

There are 5 rarities :

- **COMMON**
- **UNCOMMON**
- **RARE**
- **EPIC**
- **LEGENDARY**
- **MYTHIC**

By default, there is a list of items for **UNCOMMON**, **RARE**, **EPIC** and **LEGENDARY**.
Items that are not in any lists will have the **COMMON** rarity.

You can change the rarity of any items directly in the config file (or with [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)).

You can choose if enchanted items will earn one rarity level (enabled by default).

This mod doesn't just change the color of the item's name, it changes its rarity. So if you have installed mods that make something using rarity, they will be affected !  
For example, if you installed [Item Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-borders) and [LootBeams Fabric Updated](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootbeamsfabricupdated), the borders and beams will match the color of the rarity !

# Modpacks

You are free to use this mod in any modpacks, as long as you provide a link to this page.
